title: When the Trees Walked (மரம் நடந்த போது) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: The author liked to think the tendril moved because... / மல்லிகைக் கொடி ஏன் நகர்ந்ததாக ஆசிரியர் கருதினார்?
options: b) It wanted to be near Grandfather
questions.answer: b) It wanted to be near Grandfather
questions.explanation: The author felt the plant moves specifically to be near his grandfather.

questions.question: Grandfather's house was on the outskirts of... / தாத்தாவின் வீடு எங்கே இருந்தது?
questions.explanation: The bungalow was built on the outskirts of Dehradun, at the foot of the Himalayas.

questions.question: Which tree is a 'show-off'? / 'பந்தாவாகக்' காட்சியளிக்கும் மரம் எது?
questions.explanation: The peepul tree is described as a 'great show-off' because of its spinning leaves.

questions.question: Why grow flowers? / பூக்கள் ஏன் வளர்க்க வேண்டும்?
questions.explanation: Grandfather believed in growing flowers to attract beautiful butterflies.

questions.question: Who served in the Indian Forest Service? / இந்திய வனத்துறையில் பணியாற்றியவர் யார்?
questions.explanation: Grandfather had served for many years in the Indian Forest Service.

questions.question: What will the world become without trees? / மரங்கள் இல்லாவிட்டால் உலகம் என்னவாகும்?
questions.explanation: Grandfather warned that if we don't plant trees, the world will turn into a desert.

questions.question: George Morris wrote a poem about... / ஜார்ஜ் மோரிஸ் எதைப் பற்றி கவிதை எழுதினார்?
options: a) A Woodman and a Tree
questions.answer: a) A Woodman and a Tree
questions.explanation: He wrote the poem 'Woodman, spare that tree!'.

questions.question: Which tree has traveling aerial roots? / இடமாறி வளரும் விழுதுகளைக் கொண்ட மரம் எது?
questions.explanation: The banyan tree stays in place but its aerial roots travel to find new soil.

questions.question: Where did they find a rocky island? / அவர்கள் பாறைத் தீவை எங்கே கண்டார்கள்?
questions.explanation: They found a small rocky island in a dry river-bed where a stream once flowed.

questions.question: The author went to England after... / ஆசிரியர் எப்போது இங்கிலாந்து சென்றார்?
questions.explanation: After the war, the grandparents sold the house and went to England.

questions.question: In which month did the author return to Dehradun? / ஆசிரியர் எந்த மாதம் டேராடூனுக்குத் திரும்பினார்?
questions.explanation: Ruskin Bond returned in February, many years later.

questions.question: The island had become a... / அந்தத் தீவு என்னவாக மாறியிருந்தது?
questions.explanation: The trees they planted had multiplied, turning the rocky island green.

questions.question: Which bird challenged the author? / ஆசிரியரிடம் கேள்வி எழுப்பியது எந்தப் பறவை?
questions.explanation: A crow pheasant (and a koel) challenged him from the trees.

questions.question: What color were the coral blossoms? / பவளப்பூக்கள் என்ன நிறத்தில் இருந்தன?
questions.explanation: The coral red blossoms were spectacular and caught his eye.

questions.question: Ruskin Bond lives in... / ரஸ்கின் பாண்ட் எங்கே வசிக்கிறார்?
questions.explanation: He has lived in Landour for over 50 years.

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence: / சரியான வாக்கியத்தைத் தேர்வு செய்க:
questions.explanation: 'Whom' is used for the object of the verb.

questions.question: Which word is for countable nouns? / எண்ணக்கூடிய பெயர்ச்சொற்களுக்கு எதைப் பயன்படுத்த வேண்டும்?
questions.explanation: We use 'how many' for things we can count.

questions.question: What is the antonym of 'Fast'? / 'Fast' என்பதன் எதிர்ச்சொல் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Slow is the opposite of fast.

questions.question: A sentence that gives a command ends with a... / கட்டளை வாக்கியம் எதில் முடிவடையும்?
questions.explanation: Imperative (command) sentences usually end with a full stop.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Beckoned'? / 'Beckoned' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
options: c) To signal someone to come closer
questions.answer: c) To signal someone to come closer
questions.explanation: Beckoned means signaling with the hand to invite someone toward you.

questions.question: The author was sitting beside his grandfather on the... / ஆசிரியர் எங்கே அமர்ந்திருந்தார்?
questions.explanation: They were sitting on the veranda steps in many of the memories.

questions.question: Which state has a high diversity of flowering plants in India? / இந்தியாவில் அதிக பூக்கும் தாவரங்கள் உள்ள மாநிலம் எது?
questions.explanation: Tamil Nadu has a very high diversity (over 5000 species) of flowering plants.

questions.question: The peepul tree spinning its leaves is compared to... / அரச மர இலைகள் சுழல்வது எதனுடன் ஒப்பிடப்படுகிறது?
questions.explanation: The leaves spin like tops even when there is no breeze.

questions.question: Why was the author lonely sometimes? / ஆசிரியர் ஏன் சில சமயம் தனிமையாக உணர்ந்தார்?
questions.explanation: He often felt lonely when his grandfather was not around.

questions.question: What did they plant on the island? / அவர்கள் அந்தத் தீவில் எதை நட்டார்கள்?
questions.explanation: They planted tamarind, laburnum, and coral tree saplings.

questions.question: How many species of flowering plants are in Tamil Nadu? / தமிழ்நாட்டில் எத்தனை வகை பூக்கும் தாவரங்கள் உள்ளன?
questions.explanation: Tamil Nadu has over 5600 species of flowering plants.

questions.question: What does 'Vigorous' mean? / 'Vigorous' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Vigorous growth means growth that is healthy and strong.

questions.question: The Second World War caused the author to go to... / இரண்டாம் உலகப் போர் காரணமாக ஆசிரியர் எங்கு சென்றார்?
questions.explanation: He was sent to boarding school during the war years.

questions.question: What is the antonym of 'Rough'? / 'Rough' என்பதன் எதிர்ச்சொல் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Smooth is the opposite of rough.

questions.question: The trees 'walked' because they... / மரங்கள் 'நடந்தன' என்று ஏன் சொல்லப்படுகிறது?
questions.explanation: The trees spread across the landscape, giving the impression that they 'walked' or moved over time.
